decisions_made.decision: Normalize acceptance criteria from array (AC1, AC2, AC3) into keyed map

Fixture is synthetic/local test context with no Azure DevOps metadata
Downstream stages should know this is synthetic test context, not live ADO work item

decisions_made.decision: Capture 4 open questions about component location, server validation rules, test harness, and PrimeNG patterns
decisions_made.rationale: Fixture is well-defined but requires codebase discovery; questions will inform task decomposition phase

notes: Synthetic fixture for agent-runner medium-complexity test scenario. Fixture clearly defined with 3 ACs, 5 examples, 5 constraints, and 3 NFRs. No ambiguities in story itself; open questions pertain to implementation discovery phase. Intake complete and ready for task-generator stage.
